class.name: GazeTracker
class.brief_description: Godot Node coordinating camera tracking, model inference, and gaze coordinate projection.
class.description: GazeTracker handles camera acquisition (via CameraSensor), pipelines inputs through YuNet face detection and GazeNet estimation (via Face/Eye Estimators), smoothes projected points, and maps coordinates from camera space (millimeters) to viewport space (logical screen pixels).

method.name: initialize_tracker
method.description:
Initializes the gaze tracker, setting up camera and models.
True if initialized successfully, false otherwise.
True if initialized successfully, false otherwise.

method.name: stop_tracker
method.description:
Stops camera acquisition and model inference pipelines.
p_emit_signal Whether to emit lifecycle status change signals.
Whether to emit lifecycle status change signals.

method.name: clear_calibration
method.description: Clears active calibration, reverting to uncalibrated geometric projection.

method.name: map_viewport_to_screen
method.description:
Maps logical viewport coordinates to primary screen logical coordinates.
logical_pixel Viewport-relative coordinates. Screen-relative logical coordinates.
Viewport-relative coordinates.
Screen-relative logical coordinates.

method.name: filter_gaze_coordinate
method.description:
Filters raw gaze coordinates using configured smoothing algorithms.
raw Raw projected coordinate. Filtered smoothed coordinate.
Raw projected coordinate.
Filtered smoothed coordinate.

method.name: feed_gaze
method.description:
Manually injects raw gaze origin and direction coordinates.
face_detected True if face landmarking succeeded. origin Gaze origin 3D camera-space vector (mm). direction Gaze direction unit vector in camera-space.
True if face landmarking succeeded.
Gaze origin 3D camera-space vector (mm).
Gaze direction unit vector in camera-space.

method.name: get_head_rotation_inference_space
method.description: Gets the current head rotation in Inference Camera Space (Euler angles in degrees).

method.name: get_head_translation_inference_space
method.description: Gets the current head translation in Inference Camera Space (in millimeters).

method.name: project_gaze_ray_to_viewport
method.description:
Projects a 3D ray in Camera Space (in millimeters) onto the physical screen plane, and maps it to viewport/window-local pixel coordinates by subtracting the window position.
origin The 3D start point of the ray in Camera Space. direction The 3D direction vector of the ray in Camera Space. The 2D viewport-local pixel coordinates of the intersection point, or Vector2(INFINITY, INFINITY) (resolving to Vector2.INF in Godot) if the ray is parallel to or points away from the screen.
The 3D start point of the ray in Camera Space.
The 3D direction vector of the ray in Camera Space.
The 2D viewport-local pixel coordinates of the intersection point, or Vector2(INFINITY, INFINITY) (resolving to Vector2.INF in Godot) if the ray is parallel to or points away from the screen.

method.name: get_left_eye_center_inference_space
method.description: Gets the left eye center position in Inference Camera Space (in millimeters).

method.name: get_right_eye_center_inference_space
method.description: Gets the right eye center position in Inference Camera Space (in millimeters).

method.name: get_gaze_direction_inference_space
method.description: Gets the gaze direction unit vector in Inference Camera Space.
